minutes_briefs.title: Short-term rental reporting deadline moved up to February 28, and new exemption request dates set
minutes_briefs.summary: British Columbia has amended the Short-Term Rental Accommodations Regulation. Starting June 1, 2026, the list of communities where short-term rental rules apply is updated. More importantly, starting January 1, 2027, the annual deadline for short-term rental platform hosts to report their rental data to the province moves from March 31 to the last day of February. Also, the dates for requesting to add or remove land from the exempt list are now fixed: requests to remove land from exempt status must start by November 1 of the reference year, and requests to add land to exempt status must start by June 1 of the reference year.
minutes_briefs.action_required: Update your calendar: the annual short-term rental data reporting deadline is now February 28 (starting in 2027).

key_dates.label: BC short-term rental regulation amendments take effect
BC short-term rental data reporting deadline moves to Feb 28

minutes_briefs.source_body:
Regulation: B.C. Reg. 58/2026
Made under: Short - Term Rental Accommodations Act
Published in: No. 7 – B.C. Regs. 57 to 61, April 21, 2026
Deposit date: April 16, 2026

B.C. Reg. 58/2026, deposited April 16, 2026, under theSHORT-TERM RENTAL ACCOMMODATIONS ACT[section 38]. Order in Council 145/2026, approved and ordered April 16, 2026. On the recommendation of the undersigned, the Lieutenant Governor, by and with the advice and consent of the Executive Council, orders that (a)	effective  June 1, 2026, the Short-Term Rental Accommodations Regulation, B.C. Reg. 268/2023, is amended as set out in the attached Appendix 1, and (b)	effective January 1, 2027, the Short-Term Rental Accommodations Regulation is amended as set out in the attached Appendix 2. — C. BOYLE,Minister of Housing and Municipal Affairs; L. POPHAM,Presiding Member of the Executive Council. 1	Schedule 1 of the Short-Term Rental Accommodations Regulation, B.C. Reg. 268/2023, is amended in paragraph (a) by adding the following: 2	Schedule 2 is amended by striking out the following: 1	Section 11 (1) of the Short-Term Rental Accommodations Regulation, B.C. Reg. 268/2023, is amended (a)	in paragraph (a) by striking out "March 31" and substituting "the last day of February", and (b)	by repealing paragraph (b) (i) and substituting the following: (i)	starts on the following date: (A)	in the case of a request described in section 15 (1) (a)[removal from exempt land]of the Act, November 1 of the calendar year of the reference date; (B)	in the case of a request described in section 15 (1) (b)[addition to exempt land]of the Act, June 1 of the calendar year of the reference date, and.
